name: io.github.openaccountants/openaccountants-mcp
description: Open-source accounting skills for AI — tax, bookkeeping, payroll, e-invoicing, formation, financial statements, cross-border (Pillar Two, CBAM, FATCA/CRS, DST), and sector verticals (banking, insurance, funds, SaaS, shipping). 134 countries + 51 US states + 13 Canadian provinces/territories. Upload to Claude/ChatGPT or connect via MCP.
